zh-CN.label: 高置信
zh-CN.body: 本次作答节奏和一致性支持较稳定解释。
zh-CN.user_guidance: 根据置信度调整阅读力度，不要用它评价自己。
zh-CN.retest_note: 可在未来复测观察稳定变化。
zh-CN.why_this_level: 根据作答完整度、节奏、一致性、极端/中立倾向和反应模式综合判断。
zh-CN.how_to_read: 置信度决定阅读力度：高置信可看模式与行动，低置信先看作答状态和复测建议。
zh-CN.commercial_display: 建议在结果页用质量 Banner 明示，不隐藏在页脚。

en.label: High confidence
en.body: The response pattern supports a relatively stable interpretation.
en.user_guidance: Adjust how strongly you read the report; do not use it to judge yourself.
en.retest_note: Retest later to observe stable change.
en.why_this_level: Based on completion, response pace, consistency, extreme or neutral tendency, and response pattern.
en.how_to_read: Confidence controls reading strength: high confidence supports pattern and action; low confidence points first to response context and retest guidance.
en.commercial_display: Show this in the result-page quality banner, not only in a footer.
